title: To Tommaso De' Cavalieri. Love The Light-Giver.
meaning:
Michelangelo di Lodovico Buonarroti Simoni's contribution to classical-poetry is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To Tommaso De' Cavalieri. Love The Light-Giver."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
